source: There's a Yeti in the Playground
definition: A blizzard is a very strong snowstorm with lots of snow and wind.
sentence: The children stayed inside because the blizzard made it unsafe to go home.
not_this: not a mystery, not just cold weather
notes: Guessed 'lizard' and 'bizarre'. Needs to scan the middle of the word.

source: There's a Yeti in the Playground
definition: If something goes on indefinitely, nobody knows exactly when it will stop.
sentence: The match was delayed indefinitely because nobody knew when the storm would stop.
similar: for now, ongoing, with no set end
not_this: not definitely, not forever for sure
notes: Long word. Break into chunks first, then blend.

source: There's a Yeti in the Playground
sentence: Maisie started to shudder because she was frightened by the news.
notes: Needs to notice this is a name and use all the letters.
